parameters.query:
INSERT INTO s_substack.posts (id, feed_id, feed_name, author, title, content, url, published_at, processed, subtitle, slug, canonical_url, audience, is_published, type, meter_type, teaser_post_eligible, wordcount, language, post_date, updated_at, cover_image, cover_image_is_square, cover_image_is_explicit, body_html, truncated_body_text, section_id, audio_items, podcast_fields, theme_variables, comments, inbox_item, reaction_count, reactions, comment_count, child_comment_count, restacks)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  (SELECT id FROM s_substack.feeds_monitored WHERE name = '{{ $json.feed_name }}' LIMIT 1),
  '{{ $json.feed_name }}',
  '{{ ($json.author || "").replace(new RegExp(String.fromCharCode(39), "g"), "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.title || "").replace(new RegExp(String.fromCharCode(39), "g"), "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.content || "").replace(new RegExp(String.fromCharCode(39), "g"), "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.published_at }}',
  0,
  '{{ ($json.subtitle || "").replace(new RegExp(String.fromCharCode(39), "g"), "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.slug }}',
  '{{ $json.canonical_url }}',
  '{{ $json.audience }}',
  {{ $json.is_published }},
  '{{ $json.type }}',
  '{{ $json.meter_type }}',
  {{ $json.teaser_post_eligible }},
  {{ $json.wordcount }},
  '{{ $json.language }}',
  {{ $json.post_date ? "'" + $json.post_date + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.updated_at ? "'" + $json.updated_at + "'" : "NULL" }},
  '{{ $json.cover_image }}',
  {{ $json.cover_image_is_square }},
  {{ $json.cover_image_is_explicit }},
  '{{ ($json.body_html || "").replace(new RegExp(String.fromCharCode(39), "g"), "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.truncated_body_text || "").replace(new RegExp(String.fromCharCode(39), "g"), "''") }}',
  {{ $json.section_id !== null ? $json.section_id : "NULL" }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.audio_items || []).replace(new RegExp(String.fromCharCode(39), "g"), "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.podcast_fields || {}).replace(new RegExp(String.fromCharCode(39), "g"), "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.theme_variables || {}).replace(new RegExp(String.fromCharCode(39), "g"), "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.comments || []).replace(new RegExp(String.fromCharCode(39), "g"), "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.inbox_item || {}).replace(new RegExp(String.fromCharCode(39), "g"), "''") }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.reaction_count || 0 }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.reactions || {}).replace(new RegExp(String.fromCharCode(39), "g"), "''") }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.comment_count || 0 }},
  {{ $json.child_comment_count || 0 }},
  {{ $json.restacks || 0 }}
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  title = EXCLUDED.title, 
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  subtitle = EXCLUDED.subtitle,
  slug = EXCLUDED.slug,
  canonical_url = EXCLUDED.canonical_url,
  audience = EXCLUDED.audience,
  is_published = EXCLUDED.is_published,
  type = EXCLUDED.type,
  meter_type = EXCLUDED.meter_type,
  teaser_post_eligible = EXCLUDED.teaser_post_eligible,
  wordcount = EXCLUDED.wordcount,
  language = EXCLUDED.language,
  post_date = EXCLUDED.post_date,
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at,
  cover_image = EXCLUDED.cover_image,
  cover_image_is_square = EXCLUDED.cover_image_is_square,
  cover_image_is_explicit = EXCLUDED.cover_image_is_explicit,
  body_html = EXCLUDED.body_html,
  truncated_body_text = EXCLUDED.truncated_body_text,
  section_id = EXCLUDED.section_id,
  audio_items = EXCLUDED.audio_items,
  podcast_fields = EXCLUDED.podcast_fields,
  theme_variables = EXCLUDED.theme_variables,
  comments = EXCLUDED.comments,
  inbox_item = EXCLUDED.inbox_item,
  reaction_count = EXCLUDED.reaction_count,
  reactions = EXCLUDED.reactions,
  comment_count = EXCLUDED.comment_count,
  child_comment_count = EXCLUDED.child_comment_count,
  restacks = EXCLUDED.restacks
RETURNING id, feed_id;
